name: Bantha's Eye Laser Sight
subtitle: An extremely simple gun sight, a laser sight emits a low-power light beam to place a visible "dot" that marks the weapon's precise target.
description: This attachment can be used with any Ranged (Light) or Ranged (Heavy) weapon that does not possess the Blast quality.
Base Modifiers: Gain an automatic advantage result on successful combat checks with this weapon.
Modification Options: None.

name: Amplifying Chamber
subtitle: A blaster fires using energy to excite a small amount of volatile gas into an explosive plasma.
description: This attachment can only be installed on blasters.
Models Include: Rothana RX-99 AmpChamber, BlasTech A-13 Acceleration Chamber.
Base Modifiers: Adds the Blast 4 item quality. Adds a setback die to all Mechanics check s to maintain or repair this weapon.
Modification Options: 1 Damage +1 Mod, 5 Item Quality (Blast +1) Mods.

name: Ascension Gun
subtitle: Ascension guns are tools used to traverse difficult environments, from steep cliffs to urban battlefields.
Base Modifiers: The user can fire the ascension gun at an anchor point within medium range with an Easy difficulty Ranged (Light) or Coordination check. At the GM's discretion, aiming for a precise placement or attaching a grapnel to certain surfaces might add one or more setback dice to the check. Once the grapnel is in place, the wearer can activate the repulsor field to ascend one range band toward it every round.
Modification Options: 1 Add a boost die to checks to fire the ascension gun Mod, 1 Increase ascension speed by one range band Mod.

name: Augmented Spin Barrel
subtitle: Those who live and die by their weapon's performance endlessly tinker with it for that extra edge in a battle.
description: This attachment can only be used with blaster rifles and heavy blaster rifles.
Models Include: Dolmax 242X "Penetrator" Augmented Spin Barrel, Arakyd HH780 HotShot Barrel, BlasTech Model 213 Perforator Barrel, Dolmax 243X "Penetrator" Augmented Spin Barrel.
Base Modifiers: Increase weapon damage by 1. Adds a setback die to all Mechanics checks when performing maintenance on this weapon.
Modification Options: 2 Damage +1 Mods, 1 Item Quality (Accurate +1) Mod, 1 Item Quality (Pierce +1) Mod.

name: Augmented Vibro-motor
subtitle: The cutting edge of a vibro weapon's blade is made many times more dangerous than that of a standard blade by the power of the weapon's rapid vibro-motor, which turns the wielder's slightest motion into a powerful and potentially lethal stroke.
description: This attachment can be installed on any vibro weapon.
Base Modifiers: Increases the weapon's base damage by 1. Grants the weapon the Cumbersome 3 quality or increases its existing Cumbersome rating by 1.
Modification Options: 1 Damage +1 Mod, 1 Item Quality (Vicious +1) Mod, 1 Decrease the weapon's Cumbersome quality by 1 Mod.

name: Balanced Hilt
subtitle: Good balance is a key component in any melee weapon.
description: This attachment can be applied to any (bladed) melee weapon While the Age of Rebellion Roleplaying Game: Core Rulebook shows this as "applied to any bladed weapon", the Errata (Page 1) corrects this to "applied to any melee weapon".
Base Modifiers: Grants the weapon the Accurate (+1) quality.
Modification Options: 1 Decrease encumbrance of weapon by 1 to a minimum of 1 Mods, 1 Item Quality (Accurate +1) Mod.

name: Bayonet
subtitle: In the heat of combat, a ranged conflict can quickly turn into a melee.
description: This attachment can only be used on rifle- and carbine-sized weapons.
Models Include: SoroSuub Mk IX Bayonet, BlasTech B-3 Field Knife.
Base Modifiers: The weapon can be used as a melee weapon with the following profile: (Melee; Damage +1; Critical 3; Range ).
Modification Options: 1 Item Quality (Defensive +1) Mod, 1 Item Quality (Pierce +1) Mod.

name: Beam Splitter
subtitle: Similar to the spread barrel modification for blaster rifles, beam splitters function by modifying the Galven pattern and carefully mounting three or more emitters into a honeycomb configuration inside a stock blaster barrel.
description: This attachment can be applied to any blaster or suitable energy weapon that does not have the Blast quality.
Models Include: ArMek RE-312 Beam Splitter, Safidine "Sweeper" Emitter Modification Kit, Concordian Crescent Technologies ZE-1111 Spread Barrel.
Base Modifiers: Grants the Blast item quality with a value equal to half the weapon's damage (rounded up). Reduces the weapon's range by 1 to a minimum of engaged.
Modification Options: 2 Item Quality (Disorient +1) Mods.

name: Bipod Mount
subtitle: Little more than a pair of folding or collapsible legs mounted beneath the barrel of a long arm, bipods are used to stabilize awkward or heavy weapons to improve their firing characteristics.
description: This attachment can only be applied to rifles, carbines, and light repeating blaster, and it takes one preparation maneuver to set up.
Models Include: Galactic Arms XA Classic Bipod, Czerka AA20 Marksman Bipod.
Base Modifiers: Decrease the weapon's Cumbersome rating by 2 when firing from a prone or crouched position (or can otherwise brace the bipod on something).
Modification Options: None.

name: Blaster Actuating Module
subtitle: Actuating modules are blaster modifications popular with mercenaries, bounty hunters, gunslingers, and anyone who needs to make the first strike count.
description: This attachment is only for use on Ranged (Light) blaster pistols.
Models Include: Dolmax Heavy Blaster Actuator, Arakyd 97R Enhanced Blaster Actuating Module, SoroSuub X440 "Hammer" Blaster Actuating Module.
Base Modifiers: Increases weapon damage by 1. Adds a setback die to all checks made when using this weapon.
Modification Options: 2 Damage +1 Mods, 2 Item Quality (Pierce +1) Mods.

name: Blaster Energy Dampener
subtitle: A blaster, with its focused energy, is one of the most powerful ranged weapons, but those who wish to conceal their shots are often forced to resort to other weapons if they want to pass unnoticed.
description: This attachment is only for use on Ranged (Light) and Ranged (Heavy) blaster weapons.
Base Modifiers: Increase the difficulty of checks made to detect this weapon's fire by 1. Decrease weapon damage by 1.
Modification Options: 1 Add a setback die to checks made to detect this weapon's fire Mod.

name: Blaster Suppressor (GaG, SoR, LoNH)
subtitle: Though generally not as loud as slugthrowers, blasters usually emit an audible crack or zap upon being fired.
description: This attachment can only be used with blaster pistols.
Models Include: Merr-Sonn DS9 Blast Suppressor, Czerka "Whispershot" Silencer.
Base Modifiers: Adds two setback dice to any Perception or Vigilance checks made to locate a concealed shooter firing the silenced blaster.
Modification Options: None.

name: Blaster Suppressor (SoR table entry)
subtitle: Though generally not as loud as slugthrowers, blasters usually emit an audible crack or zap upon being fired.
description: This attachment can only be used with blaster pistols.
Models Include: Merr-Sonn DS9 Blast Suppressor, Czerka "Whispershot" Silencer.
Base Modifiers: Adds two setback dice to any Perception or Vigilance checks made to locate a concealed shooter firing the silenced blaster.
Modification Options: None.

name: Bowcaster Accelerator Enhancement
subtitle: Built from scavenged blaster parts and the occasional piece from a repulsorlift generator, the bowcaster accelerator enhancement is the second most common modification to Wookiee bowcasters after the automatic re-cocker.
description: This attachment is only for use on Wookiee bowcasters and cannot be purchased; it must be built either by the owner of the bowcaster with an Average difficulty Mechanics check or by the weaponsmith who built the weapon for them. This item is not available for sale, but parts may be bought for 250 credits.
Base Modifiers: Increases weapon damage by 1.
Modification Options: 2 Damage +1 Mods, 2 Item Quality (Pierce +1) Mods.

name: Bowcaster Automatic Re-cocker
subtitle: A time-consuming and labor-intensive process, reloading a bowcaster is made much easier by use of the automatic re-cocker.
description: This attachment is only for use on Wookiee bowcasters and cannot be purchased; it must be built either by the owner of the bowcaster with an Average difficulty Mechanics check or by the weaponsmith who built the weapon for them. This item is not available for sale, but parts may be bought for 500 credits.
Base Modifiers: Removes reloading maneuver requirement from bowcaster.
Modification Options: 1 Item Quality (Auto-fire) Mod.

name: Built-in Blaster Sight
subtitle: A typical modification used by the Rebellion's Spec-Force troops, this attachment allows a harmless beam of energy to trickle out of the barrel on a half-trigger pull to "paint" the target, letting the wielder see exactly where [they are] aiming.
description: This attachment can be applied to energy ranged weapons.
Models Include: Neuro-Savv "Deadeye" Sight, Tana Ire y-30Z Targeting Beam.
Base Modifiers: Remove a setback die added by the Called Shot use of the Aim maneuver from Ranged (Light) and Ranged (Heavy) checks.
Modification Options: None.

name: Clone Firing Key
subtitle: One of the early initiatives the Kaminoans considered when developing equipment for the clone troopers was to code their equipment specifically to the clone genetic sequence, to prevent looting and sabotage.
description: This attachment can be installed on any personal blaster weapon.
Base Modifiers: The weapon functions only in the hands of a clone.
Modification Options: 1 reprogram authorized user genetic sequence (choose one non-clone character) Mod.

name: Combat Tested
subtitle: Over the course of numerous battles, combatants can make a variety of minor personalizations and tweaks to their gear, from notches for successful missions or targets destroyed carved into the butts of rifles, to the attachment of trophies taken from enemy droids or the battlefield.
description: Such personalizations can be installed on any weapon that the owner has used through extended periods of combat, as determined by the GM.
Base Modifiers: Owner adds a boost die to Discipline checks.
Modification Options: 1 Add a boost die to checks to resist Fear Mod.

name: Componentization (GaG)
subtitle: This attachment allows a weapon to be broken down into a number of innocuous-looking pieces so that it can be smuggled into and out of places where weapons are not allowed or are highly regulated.
description: It takes two maneuvers to assemble or disassemble a weapon with this mod. [...] This attachment can be applied to any weapon with an encumbrance of 2 or less.
Base Modifiers: Allows a weapon to be broken into pieces and disguised as other items. A character must make a Formidable difficulty Mechanics or Skulduggery check to deduce the items are weapon parts.
Modification Options: None.

name: Componentization (CaM)
subtitle: This attachment allows a weapon to be broken down into a number of innocuous-looking pieces so that it can be smuggled into and out of places where weapons are not allowed or are highly regulated.
description: It takes two maneuvers to assemble or disassemble a weapon with this mod. [...] This attachment can be applied to any weapon with an encumbrance of 2 or less.
Base Modifiers: Allows a weapon to be broken into pieces and disguised as other items. A character must make a Formidable difficulty Mechanics or Skulduggery check to deduce the items are weapon parts.
Modification Options: None.

name: Cortosis Forging
subtitle: For most, dueling a Jedi is a fool's errand, and even more so in close combat, where lightsabers dictate the terms of battle.
description: This attachment can be installed on any Melee weapon.
Base Modifiers: Weapon gains the Cortosis quality.
Modification Options: 2 Item Quality (Pierce +1) Mods.

name: Custom Grip
subtitle: A skilled tinkerer can tailor a weapon to perfectly fits its wielder's hand.
description: This attachment can be applied to any weapon with a handle.
Base Modifiers: Remove a setback die from all combat checks the weapon's owner makes using this weapon. Anyone other than the owner instead adds two setback dice to all combat checks made using it.
Modification Options: 1 Item Quality (Accurate +1) Mod.

name: Droid Brain Detonator
subtitle: Weapon manufacturers, combat engineers, and sabotage specialists are constantly inventing new triggers and detonators for explosive devices of all kinds, in order to provide for every conceivable situation.
description: This attachment can be applied to any grenade or explosive device.
Models Include: CryonCorp D9 Demolitions Droid, SoroSuub XS-3 Intelligent Detonation System.
Base Modifiers: The explosive's detonator is controlled by a droid brain that can activate under any predetermined circumstances its owner dictates.
Modification Options: None.

name: Droid Targeting System
subtitle: Although droids are most commonly thought of as autonomous mobile constructs, the advanced artificial intelligence of droid brains has been used in a variety of other applications for thousands of years.
description: This attachment can be applied to any personal ranged weapon.
Models Include: Baktoid Industries T-80 Droid Targeter, GoCorp "Surefire" Enhancement System.
Base Modifiers: Upgrade the ability on Ranged combat checks made with this weapon once.
Modification Options: 1 Add a boost die to one Ranged combat check per encounter Mod, 1 Suffer 3 strain to remove a despair result from Ranged combat check Mod.

name: Electronic Sighting System
subtitle: By adding a small electronic device to the top of a blaster or other ranged weapon, a small holographic crosshair is projected a meter out from the weapon's barrel.
description: This attachment can be used on any ranged weapon that could logically benefit from the addition of a sight.
Base Modifiers: Allows the shooter to aim as an incidental once per round at short range. Decrease the difficulty of Perception checks to locate the shooter in low light conditions by 1.
Modification Options: 1 Item Quality (Accurate +1) Mod.

name: Energy Overclock Setting
subtitle: As deadly and dangerous as they are, vibro weapons can be even deadlier with the inclusion of an overclock setting.
description: This attachment can be applied to any vibro weapon or any other powered Melee or Brawl weapon.
Base Modifiers: Once per turn as a maneuver, the wielder may activate the overclock setting to grant the weapon Vicious 3 (or increase the value of its Vicious quality by +3) until the end of the next round. If the wielder generates three threat results or despair on a combat check with the weapon before the end of the next round, the weapon overheats or shorts out and ceases to function entirely until the end of the encounter.
Modification Options: 1 Add an automatic advantage result to combat checks with this weapon Mod, 1 Activate attachment as an incidental Mod.

name: Enhanced XCiter
subtitle: Technicians, Engineers, and Tinkerers have long known how to modify the gas conversion XCiter in a blaster to yield a more highly energetic—and correspondingly more destructive—payload.
description: This attachment can be applied to any blaster.
Base Modifiers: Decrease critical rating by 1 (to a minimum of 1). The GM may spend two despair results from any combat check using the weapon to cause the blaster to explode, destroying it and inflicting an automatic Critical Injury on the wielder.
Modification Options: 3 Item Quality (Pierce +1) Mod.

name: Environmental Adaptation Kit
subtitle: The varied and often hazardous environments found throughout the galaxy have a tendency to hinder and harm even the sturdiest, most well-built pieces of equipment.
description: Environmental adaptation kits can be attached to any ranged weapon.
Base Modifiers: Prevents a weapon from breaking down as a result of a specific type of environment.
Modification Options: None.

name: Filed Front Sight
subtitle: A common modification to holdout blasters, along with removing their serial numbers, is filing down the weapon's front sight.
description: This modification may only be applied to pistol-sized weapons. Doing the work oneself requires an Average difficulties Mechanics check. The listed price is used when paying someone else to perform the work.
Base Modifiers: Innate Talent (Quick Draw). Increases difficulty of combat checks to hit targets at ranges beyond short range by 1.
Modification Options: 1 Decreases the difficulty of checks to conceal the weapon by 1 Mod.

name: Force-Attuned Resonator
subtitle: When the Jedi artificer Sokiro Terebin set about reproducing the crystalline, Force-attuned resonators from the blasters she had unearthed at Site-145 on Filata, she first had to solve numerous technical challenges.
description: This attachment can be applied to any Ranged (Light) or Ranged (Heavy) weapon that has a trigger.
Base Modifiers: A character must possess a Force rating of 1 or higher and knowledge of how the resonator mechanism works in order to operate this weapon.
Modification Options: 1 Innate Talent (Prescient Shot) Mod.

name: Force-Attuned Resonator (table entry)
subtitle: When the Jedi artificer Sokiro Terebin set about reproducing the crystalline, Force-attuned resonators from the blasters she had unearthed at Site-145 on Filata, she first had to solve numerous technical challenges.
description: This attachment can be applied to any Ranged (Light) or Ranged (Heavy) weapon that has a trigger.
Base Modifiers: A character must possess a Force rating of 1 or higher and knowledge of how the resonator mechanism works in order to operate this weapon.
Modification Options: 1 Innate Talent (Prescient Shot) Mod.

name: Forearm Grip
subtitle: Little more than a vertical handgrip affixed below the barrel of a rifle-sized weapon, the forearm grip is a very popular attachment among mercenaries and professional soldiers across the galaxy.
description: This attachment can only be used on rifle and carbine-sized weapons (but not heavy rifles).
Models Include: Dolmax 14A Detachable Pistol Grip, Galactic Arms Model 9 Forearm Grip, Merr-Sonn AG44S Ergonomic Tactical Foregrip.
Base Modifiers: Decreases the additional difficulty of making Ranged (Heavy) checks with this weapon while engaged to an additional difficulty die (rather than two difficulty dice).
Modification Options: 1 Innate Talent (Point Blank rank +1) Mod, 1 Item Quality (Accurate +1) Mod.

name: Galven Pattern Resequencing
subtitle: Some operatives would gladly trade a little reliability in exchange for the stopping power necessary to penetrate an opponent's armor.
description: This attachment can only be used with blaster pistols and heavy blaster pistols.
Base Modifiers: Increases weapon damage by 1. Adds two automatic threat results to all combat checks made using this weapon.
Modification Options: 2 Damage +1 Mods, 2 Item Quality (Pierce +1) Mods.

name: Gene-Lock
subtitle: Some people form a great attachment, even a bond, with their weapon and take steps to ensure that no others can use it.
description: This attachment can be applied to any handheld weapon. This upgrade is most relevant for ranged weapons, but it is possible to gene-lock a vibroblade or similar weapon. In this case, an unauthorized user can still wield the weapon as a basic sword, etc., but any technological components such as a vibro-motor cease to function.
Base Modifiers: The weapon functions only in the hands of its authorized owner.
Modification Options: 1 Self Destruct Mod (The weapon detonates if an unauthorized user tries to fire it, inflicting one Critical Injury on the user [roll normally to determine the Critical Injury]. The weapon is destroyed if it self-destructs.)

name: Grenade Cling
subtitle: Proper placement of explosives is a key factor in the effectiveness of a device's destructive potential.
description: This attachment can be added to any grenade or explosive device.
Models Include: Merr-Sonn Munitions CN-55 EM Lock, SoroSuub STK-17 Demolitions Device.
Base Modifiers: The grenade immediately adheres to its target, and an Average difficulty Athletics check is needed to remove it. The target struck by the grenade cannot avoid the blast or throw the grenade back at the attacker, regardless of any time-delayed detonation. At the GM's discretion, some types of surfaces may resist the adhesion.
Modification Options: 2 Increase damage by 1 to stuck target Mods, 2 Increase difficulty to remove adhered grenade once Mods.

name: Gunner Droid Brain
subtitle: Much more than a simple targeting computer, a specialized droid brain can be installed on a ship to operate its weapons independently or assist a sentient gunner.
description: This attachment can be applied to any vehicle or starship.
Base Modifiers: Droid brain can perform Gunnery checks for vehicle with a Gunnery skill of 2 and an Agility of 0 (if unassisted, it rolls two ability dice for Gunnery checks). Although a droid brain can be connected to more than one weapon system, it is still limited to one action per turn.
Modification Options: 2 Increase the droid brain's Gunnery skill by 1 Mods.

name: Gyrostabilizer
subtitle: A gyrostabilizer, or repulsorlift harness, artificially reduces the weight of a weapon, allowing a user to heft and aim a heavy weapon with greatly decreased difficulty.
description: This attachment can be applied to any Ranged (Heavy) or Gunnery Weapon.
Models Include: TaggeCo. Type 2 Repulsorlift Harness, BlasTech Mk. IV Gyrostabilization Unit.
Base Modifiers: Decreases Cumbersome quality by 1.
Modification Options: 3 Decrease Cumbersome quality by 1 Mods, 1 Innate Talent (Barrage) Mod.

name: Hair Trigger
subtitle: Many pistols are designed to cycle and fire as quickly as the trigger can be depressed.
description: Hair triggers can only be installed on Ranged (Light) pistols that lack the Auto-fire quality.
Models Include: Morellian MWC-HS Hyper Trigger, BlasTech Industries 009 Fastshot.
Base Modifiers: Grants the pistol the Linked 1 and Inaccurate 2 item qualities.
Modification Options: 1 Item Quality (Inaccurate –1) Mod.

name: Hunting Barrel
subtitle: Designed to increase range and accuracy, a hunting barrel can turn any blaster rifle into a dedicated hunting weapon.
description: A hunting barrel can only be used on a blaster rifle.
Models Include: Czerka Model 2 "Huntsman" Precision Barrel, SoroSuub WQ60 "Sure-shot" Barrel, Arakyd 3100 "Deadeye" Barrel.
Base Modifiers: Increases weapon's range by one range band. Adds Cumbersome (+2) quality to the weapon, and increases encumbrance by +1.
Modification Options: 2 Item Quality (Accurate +1) Mods, 1 Innate Talent (Lethal Blows) Mod.

name: Insulated Firing Mechanisms
subtitle: One of the most insidious dangers of the battlefield comes not from the foes combatants face, but from the risks of their own gear failing.
description: This attachment can be installed on any personal-scale blaster weapon.
Models Include: Czerka Parts Replacement Kit NX3-4r, BlasTech "My First Blaster" Safety Kit.
Base Modifiers: Increase the advantage or threat result cost of any effect that damages the weapon (such as the Sunder quality) by one advantage or threat result (as applicable). The weapon gains the Prepare 1 quality, or increases its existing Prepare quality by 1. Repairs to the weapon when damaged cost half as much.
Modification Options: 1 Reduce Prepare quality by 1 Mod.

name: Integrated Illuminator
subtitle: Operating in darkness is never ideal, but there are several ways to compensate for a lack of night vision.
description: This attachment can be applied to any ranged weapon that could logically benefit from a spotlight.
Models Include: CSA "Nightfighter" Weapon Lamp, Loronar L09 Lamp.
Base Modifiers: Removes up to two setback dice due to darkness on any checks to use this weapon against targets within short range.
Modification Options: 1 Increase spotlight range to medium Mod, 2 Item Quality (Disorient +1) Mods.

name: Integrated Scanner
subtitle: There are times when a trooper needs to scan an area for danger as well as keep their weapon at the ready.
description: This attachment can be applied to any Ranged (Heavy) weapon.
Models Include: Carbanti United Electronics Mk. II Omni-Scope, CryonCorp "Heads-Up" Scanner Suite.
Base Modifiers: The weapon incorporates a general purpose scanner that the wielder can use while the weapon is drawn. The wielder adds two automatic advantage results to Initiative checks while the weapon is drawn.
Modification Options: 2 Remove a setback die from Initiative checks Mods.

name: Ionizing Focusing Coils
subtitle: Dealing with the droid army of the CIS has made advancements in ion technology a high priority for Republic military researchers and contractors, although research in the field has produced mixed results.
description: This attachment can be installed on any personal-scale blaster weapon.
Base Modifiers: Increase weapon damage by 2 versus droids. Opponents may spend two threat results or a despair result on combat checks using the weapon to damage the weapon one step.
Modification Options: 2 Damage +1 versus droids Mods, 1 Decrease weapon's critical rating versus droids by 1 to a minimum of 1 Mod, 1 Increase threat result required to backfire by 1 Mod.

name: Lightweight Frame
subtitle: This mod reduces both the weight and bulk of ranged weapons to make them easier to handle and conceal.
description: This attachment can be applied to any weapon.
Base Modifiers: Reduces a weapon's encumbrance by 1 to a minimum of 1 Mod.
Modification Options: 1 Reduce a weapon's encumbrance by 1 to a minimum of 1 Mod.

name: Magnetic Weapon Tether
subtitle: A magnetic weapon tether is a relatively simple modification that consists of a small magnetic device built into the weapon.
description: This attachment can be applied to any weapon wielded in one hand that could logically benefit from a weapon tether.
Base Modifiers: During their turn, the wielder may recover the weapon as an incidental if they are engaged with it.
Modification Options: 1 Innate Talent (Quick Draw) Mod.

name: Mandalorian Chamber
subtitle: A relatively recent innovation commonly known as the Mandalorian chamber [...] enables the blaster to simultaneously apply characteristics of both the deadly and stun settings.
description: This attachment can only be installed on blasters.
Base Modifiers: Grants the weapon the Stun 3 item quality and reduces its range by one range band.
Modification Options: 3 Item Quality (Disorient +1) Mods, 2 Item Quality (Stun) +1 Mods, 1 Increase Range by One Range Band Mod.

name: Marked-Target Firing Lock
subtitle: In the chaos of a fire fight, shots can go astray, damaging property or bystanders.
description: This attachment can be installed on any ranged weapon that does not possess the Blast or Auto-fire quality.
Models Include: BlasTech "Surefire" Safety Sensor, Cadregg Armory Model-87 Weapon Sensor.
Base Modifiers: The wielder of a weapon with this attachment may designate a target as an incidental while performing the aim maneuver. Once a target has been designated, the weapon cannot be fired at another target. All combat checks made with the weapon to attack the designated target cancel one additional threat result after threat has been used to cancel any advantage results. Only one target can be designated at a time, and the wielder may disengage the lock as a maneuver.
Modification Options: 1 Cancel an additional threat result Mod.

name: Marksman Barrel
subtitle: Marksman barrels are designed to meet the needs of soldiers for whom long range accuracy is a necessity.
description: This attachment may only be applied on blaster rifles.
Models Include: Merr-Sonn KX756 Marksman Barrel, SoroSuub WQ80 "Long-shot" Barrel, Arakyd 3300 Hawkeye Sharpshooter's Barrel.
Base Modifiers: Increases weapon's range by one range band. The weapon gains the Cumbersome 2 quality.
Modification Options: 2 Weapon Quality (Accurate +1) Mods, 1 Innate Talent (Sniper Shot) Mod.

name: Mono-molecular Edge
subtitle: All bladed weapons, even vibro weapons, can benefit from an edged sharpened to mono-molecular thickness and toughened through laser-forging techniques.
description: This modification may be applied to Melee weapons that use a cutting edge.
Base Modifiers: Decreases the weapon's crit rating by 1 to a minimum of 1.
Modification Options: 2 Item Quality (Pierce +1) Mods.

name: Motion Tracker
subtitle: This sophisticated device incorporates a full suite of onboard sensors and computers to track and predict the motion of a target, then feed that data back to the user through a variety of means, including a helmet HUD, a hardwired feed jacked directly into the brain, or other methods.
description: This attachment can be applied to any Ranged (Heavy) weapon.
Models Include: CryonCorp Xv3 "Surefire" Motion Predictor, Industrial Automaton A-3 Tracking Computer.
Base Modifiers: Remove a setback die due to the target's movement or use of the Guarded Stance maneuver.
Modification Options: 1 Innate Talent (Precise Aim) Mod.

name: Multi-optic Sight (GaG, AoR, EotE)
subtitle: A complex and sophisticated piece of equipment, the multi-optic sight is a wonder of modern sensor technology.
description: This attachment can be fitted to any ranged weapon.
Models Include: Galactic Arms Multi-Spectral Optical Array, Merr-Sonn 480.z1 "Beholder" Multi-Optic Sight, Atlas Corp MULTI Omni-Sight, Galactic Arms Model 44 Combat Optical Enhancer, SoroSuub XAD Omnisight.
Base Modifiers: Removes up to two setback dice on any checks to use this weapon due to smoke, darkness, or other environmental conditions that obstruct vision.
Modification Options: 2 Skill (Perception) Mods.

name: Multi-optic Sight (SS)
subtitle: A complex and sophisticated piece of equipment, the multi-optic sight is a wonder of modern sensor technology.
description: This attachment can be fitted to any ranged weapon.
Models Include: Galactic Arms Multi-Spectral Optical Array, Merr-Sonn 480.z1 "Beholder" Multi-Optic Sight, Atlas Corp MULTI Omni-Sight, Galactic Arms Model 44 Combat Optical Enhancer, SoroSuub XAD Omnisight.
Base Modifiers: Removes up to two setback dice on any checks to use this weapon due to smoke, darkness, or other environmental conditions that obstruct vision.
Modification Options: 2 Skill (Perception) Mods.

name: Night Vision Scope
subtitle: This attachment uses an optical system similar to a set of electrobinoculars that shows infrared wavelengths of light, effectively allowing the shooter to track heat signatures in dark or concealed areas, or through walls.
description: This attachment can be used on any ranged weapon, with the exception of single-use weapons and weapons that would not realistically benefit from a scope.
Models Include: Fabritech LRS Low-Light Scope, Zikon Optics Model 45 Infrascope.
Base Modifiers: Remove up to two setback dice on any checks to use this weapon due to darkness.
Modification Options: None.

name: Optimized Energy Cell
subtitle: In a fire fight, there is no such thing as having too many shots left in your blaster.
description: This attachment can applied to any energy weapon.
Models Include: Czerka Arms Model 4 Expanded Gas Reservoir, BlasTech X-3 Extended Energy Cell.
Base Modifiers: When the GM would spend a despair result or a number of threat results to cause the weapon to run out of ammunition, it requires an additional threat to have that effect apply to this weapon.
Modification Options: None.

name: Ordnance Impeller
subtitle: Over the millennia, tinkerers, weapon designers, and desperate fighters have come up with countless delivery systems for explosives, from missile tubes to combat droids.
description: This attachment can be applied to any grenade or explosive device with an encumbrance of 3 or less.
Models Include: Ghelrar Consortium Multipurpose Repulsor Unit, Rebaxan Columni MSE-6 Repair Droid (modified).
Base Modifiers: The explosive is able to move overland at roughly the rate of a character on foot. The listed price includes a holocam and remote-control unit, allowing for operation and detonation of the mobile explosive from up to extreme range, although intervening materials may decrease this distance. Any skill checks to operate the mobile explosive use Computers or Piloting (Planetary) (character's choice).
Modification Options: 1 Add ten-meter maximum altitude Mod.

name: Overcharge Valve
subtitle: An overcharge valve is a simple (if dangerous) modification that allows the wielder of a blaster to discharge the entire ammunition reserve in a single, devastating shot.
description: This attachment can be applied to any blaster or energy weapon that could logically benefit from it.
Base Modifiers: As an incidental, the wielder may have the weapon gain the Prepare 1 quality and increases its damage by 4 for the next attack make with it. After firing, the weapon runs out of ammunition.
Modification Options: None.

name: Overcharged Actuating Module
subtitle: While some weaponsmiths try to squeeze every last bit of energy form a power cell, others try to cram as much energy as they can into every shot.
description: This attachment can be applied to any blaster pistol or carbine.
Models Include: BlasTech Mk. II Actuating Module, SoroSuub BlastPro.
Base Modifiers: Increases weapon damage by +1. The Game Master may spend two threat results from any combat check made with this weapon to have it become damaged one step.
Modification Options: 1 Damage +1 Mod.

name: Paired Weapons
subtitle: Warriors have a long history of employing two weapons at one time in a variety of combat engagements.
description: This attachment can only be applied to one-handed weapons.
Base Modifiers: Must be applied to two weapons at the same time. Reduces advantage result required to hit with the secondary weapon when two-weapon fighting with this pair of weapons by 1.
Modification Options: None.

name: Pistol Grip
subtitle: A pistol grip replaces the stock or other grip on a long gun with one like that of a pistol, allowing it to be fired one-handed.
description: This attachment can be used with any Ranged (Heavy) blaster rifle, blaster carbine, or slugthrower that does not possess the Cumbersome quality.
Base Modifiers: The weapon's skill changes to Ranged (Light), but use adds a setback die to any combat check made while firing the weapon one-handed. The weapon's range is reduced to medium if longer.
Modification Options: None.

name: Poison Reservoir
subtitle: Many assassins who use melee weapons choose to improve the lethality of their blades by adding a poison reservoir that releases a toxin through a channel in the blade at the push of a button in the hilt.
description: This attachment can only be used with Brawl and Melee weapons. While Lords of Nal Hutta: A Sourcebook for Hutt Space shows a cost of "(R) 500" in the entry, the Errata (Page 4) corrects this to "(R) 400".
Modification Options: 4 Increase the number of doses of a poison the reservoir can hold by 1 Mods.

name: Proximity Detonator (GaG)
subtitle: Although certain models of mines include proximity detonators as standard, some individuals desire this feature for grenades and other explosive devices.
description: This weapon attachment can be applied to any grenade or explosive device.
Models Include: Merr-Sonn Model 8 Smart Trigger, SoroSuub Mk III Proximity Detonator.
Base Modifiers: [As an action, the user can set this setting.] The weapon detonates when a being or creature of silhouette 1 or larger comes within short or engaged range, as determined by the user when placed. At the GM's discretion, other sources of movement within range may cause the device to detonate.
Modification Options: None.

name: Proximity Detonator (CotR)
subtitle: Although certain models of mines include proximity detonators as standard, some individuals desire this feature for grenades and other explosive devices.
description: This weapon attachment can be applied to any grenade or explosive device.
Models Include: Merr-Sonn Model 8 Smart Trigger, SoroSuub Mk III Proximity Detonator.
Base Modifiers: [As an action, the user can set this setting.] The weapon detonates when a being or creature of silhouette 1 or larger comes within short or engaged range, as determined by the user when placed. At the GM's discretion, other sources of movement within range may cause the device to detonate.
Modification Options: None.

name: Proximity Detonator (FO)
subtitle: Although certain models of mines include proximity detonators as standard, some individuals desire this feature for grenades and other explosive devices.
description: This weapon attachment can be applied to any grenade or explosive device.
Models Include: Merr-Sonn Model 8 Smart Trigger, SoroSuub Mk III Proximity Detonator.
Base Modifiers: [As an action, the user can set this setting.] The weapon detonates when a being or creature of silhouette 1 or larger comes within short or engaged range, as determined by the user when placed. At the GM's discretion, other sources of movement within range may cause the device to detonate.
Modification Options: None.

name: Rapid-Recharge XCiter
subtitle: Specially modified gas conversion enablers (XCiters) can allow a blaster pistol or rifle to achieve much higher rates of fire than factory standard, even rivaling those of a true repeating blaster.
description: This attachment can be applied to any blaster.
Models Include: BlasTech XCelerator, SoroSuub M-3 Cycling Module, various custom models.
Base Modifiers: The weapon gains the Auto-fire quality and the Inaccurate 3 quality.
Modification Options: 2 Decrease Inaccurate quality by 1 Mods.

name: Scanner-Proof Hardware
subtitle: Scanner-proof hardware is a collection of upgrades that together make a weapon virtually invisible to scanners.
description: This attachment can be applied to any weapon.
Base Modifiers: The weapon cannot be detected by standard weapon-detecting technologies. Characters using advanced scanners must make a Hard difficulty Computers check to find the weapon. Physical body searches can still locate the weapon as usual. GMs may spend two threat results or a despair result on a combat check to render the weapon inoperable, requiring a major repair before it can be used again.
Modification Options: 1 Reduce the weapon's encumbrance by 1 to a minimum of 1 Mod.

name: Secondary Ion Blaster
subtitle: Among the many weapons mounted on the underside of rifles is one that saw a lot of use during the Clone Wars.
description: This attachment can be used with any Ranged (Heavy) weapon.
Models Include: SoroSuub Droid Defender, BlasTech Model 9 Under-Barrel Ion Blaster.
Base Modifiers: Enables the weapon to fire using the following profile at the user's choice: (Ranged ; Damage 10; Critical 5; Range ; Disorient 5, Ion). Adds Cumbersome (+1) to weapon and increases encumbrance by 1.
Modification Options: 2 Increase ion blaster's damage by +1 Mods.

name: Secondary Missile System
subtitle: Arms manufacturers are constantly inventing new weapon systems to allow for heavy, portable firepower.
description: This attachment can be used with any rifle that uses the Ranged (Heavy) skill.
Base Modifiers: Enables the weapon to fire rockets or missiles. This uses the missile's profile (including Range) and requires the Gunnery skill to use. Adds Cumbersome (+2) quality to the weapon and increases encumbrance by +3. Missiles have Limited Ammo 1, so the launcher must be reloaded.
Modification Options: None.

name: Serrated Edge
subtitle: The simplicity of this modification belies its viciousness.
description: This modification may be applied to Melee weapons that use a cutting edge.
Base Modifiers: Grants the weapon the Vicious (+1) quality.
Modification Options: None.

name: Set Trigger
subtitle: Commonly known as a "hair-trigger," this weapon retooling allows a blaster or slugthrower to fire with barely a touch of the trigger.
description: This attachment can be applied to any Ranged (Light) or Ranged (Heavy) weapon.
Base Modifiers: Adds an automatic success and threat result to the first combat check made with this weapon each encounter.
Modification Options: 1 Add an automatic advantage or success result to the first combat check made with this weapon each encounter Mod.

name: Shadowsheath
subtitle: Bounty hunters, assassins, and other criminals often have a need to conceal weapons on their bodies to sneak them past guards or get close to a target without arising alarm.
description: This attachment may be installed on any weapon with an encumbrance of 2 or less.
Base Modifiers: Increase the difficulty of any checks made to detect the sheath or weapon it holds by 2.
Modification Options: None.

name: Shield Discharge Pack
subtitle: Despite being nearly as ancient as warfare, shields continue to be popular items, serving as trusted defenders of warriors on low-tech planets and protecting life and limb of security forces in densely populated areas.
description: This attachment only be applied to a shield or buckler.
Base Modifiers: When the wielder suffers a hit from a Melee, Brawl, or Lightsaber combat check, after the attack is resolved, the character may spend two threat results or a despair result to cause the attacker to suffer 3 strain (this ignores soak).
Modification Options: 1 Innate Talent (Defensive Stance) Mod, 2 Item Quality (Disorient +1) Mods.

name: Shock Pulse Emitter
subtitle: Shock pulse emitters operate along principles similar to a blaster's Stun setting, but at a much shorter effective range—short enough to make them of little use as standalone.
description: This attachment can be installed on any Melee or Brawl weapon.
Base Modifiers: Grants the weapon the Stun (+2) quality.
Modification Options: 1 Item Quality (Disorient +1) Mod, 2 Item Quality (Stun +1) Mods.

name: Shortened Barrel
subtitle: Shortened barrels are a handy modification used by spies, plainclothes law enforcement officers, and others who wish to conceal the fact that they're carrying a weapon.
description: This attachment can only be applied to Ranged (Light) pistols.
Models Include: Arakyd SB4 "Stubber," SoroSuub SBSS Reduced Length Barrel.
Base Modifiers: Reduces the difficulty of checks made to conceal this weapon by one. Reduces range by one range band, to a minimum of short. If already short, add a setback die to attack checks.
Modification Options: 1 Innate Talent (Quick Draw) Mod.

name: Slugthrower Suppressor
subtitle: Suppressors are used by assassins and sharpshooters to make their weapons quieter and more difficult to detect when firing.
description: Suppressors can only be used on Ranged (Light) and Ranged (Heavy) slugthrower weapons.
Models Include: Czerka Mk. I Suppressor, SoroSuub "Whisperflite" Slugthrower Silencer.
Base Modifiers: Adds two setback dice to any Perception or Vigilance checks made to locate a concealed shooter firing the silenced slugthrower.
Modification Options: None.

name: Sonic Scope
subtitle: Developed to overcome personal cloaking devices and other sensor-baffling defenses, a sonic scope uses ultrasonic sound waves to detect a target and generate a visual representation.
description: This attachment can be used with any Ranged (Heavy) weapon.
Models Include: CryonCorp PL-1 "Second Sight" Scope, SoroSuub Model Z Integrated Sonar System.
Base Modifiers: The character may observe and target enemies who are completely hidden by solid objects that the weapon can penetrate. At the Game Master's discretion, the target might receive additional defense or even soak to reflect shooting through a solid object.
Modification Options: 1 Skill (Cool) Mod, 1 Skill (Vigilance) Mod, 2 Innate Talent (Precise Aim) Mods.

name: Spread Barrel
subtitle: Designed with the kind of close-quarters combat found in buildings and starship corridors in mind, a spread barrel replaces a blaster's stock barrel with one that is shorter, bulkier, and equipped with a built-in flash-hider.
description: This attachment can only be applied to blaster rifles and blaster carbines.
Models Include: BlasTech 8405 "Scattergun" Spread Barrel, SoroSuub 800 "Blunderbuss" Barrel, Arakyd Model 70 "Chain Lightning" Spread Barrel.
Base Modifiers: Grants weapon the Blast (+4) item quality or grants weapon quality Blast (4). Reduces weapon's range by one range band, to a minimum of engaged.
Modification Options: 2 Item Quality (Blast +1) Mods.

name: Staged Rocket Booster (GaG)
subtitle: The limitations of size mean that most micro-rockets lack the fuel capacity to reach distant targets.
description: This attachment can be installed on any micro-rocket.
Base Modifiers: Increases the weapon's range by one range band. Adds the Inaccurate (+2 ) quality to the weapon.
Modification Options: 1 Increase the weapon's range by one additional range band Mod, 2 Reduce the weapon's Inaccurate quality by 1 Mods.

name: Staged Rocket Booster (ND)
subtitle: The limitations of size mean that most micro-rockets lack the fuel capacity to reach distant targets.
description: This attachment can be installed on any micro-rocket.
Base Modifiers: Increases the weapon's range by one range band. Adds the Inaccurate (+2 ) quality to the weapon.
Modification Options: 1 Increase the weapon's range by one additional range band Mod, 2 Reduce the weapon's Inaccurate quality by 1 Mods.

name: Stripped Down
subtitle: By removing redundant components and stripping down the body, it is possible to significantly reduce the weight and profile of a blaster or other weapon.
description: This attachment can be used with any Ranged (Light) or Ranged (Heavy) weapon.
Base Modifiers: Decrease the weapon's encumbrance by 1 (to a minimum of 1). Add a setback die to a character's Perception checks to find the weapon when it is hidden.
Modification Options: 2 Decrease encumbrance by 1 (to a minimum of 1) Mods.

name: Stun pulse
subtitle: A stun pulse attachment deals an electric shock to the target, in addition to its weapon's normal damage.
description: A stun pulse can be attached to any bludgeoning Melee or Brawl weapon.
Models Include: CoroTech EV45 Pulse Coil, SoroSuub "Enforcer" Stunner.
Base Modifiers: The weapon gains the Stun 2 quality.
Modification Options: 3 Item Quality (Stun +1) Mods.

name: Superior Weapon Customization
subtitle: Even the simplest weapon can benefit from a craftsman's touch.
Base Modifiers: Grants the weapon the Superior quality.
Modification Options: None.

name: Telescopic Optical Sight
subtitle: Popular with snipers and hunters, this attachment is essentially a long tube with a pair of telescopic lenses attached to the top of a weapon.
description: This attachment can be used on any ranged weapon that could logically benefit from the addition of a sight.
Models Include: Zikon Optics Model 40 Marksman Scope, Merr-Sonn 80Z Telescopic Optical Sight.
Base Modifiers: Reduces the difficulty of ranged combat checks at long and extreme range by one.
Modification Options: None.

name: Tibanna-Jacked
subtitle: There are a number of ways to increase the energy output of blaster weaponry, but the cheapest is probably to Tibanna-jack the weapon.
Base Modifiers: May upgrade the difficulty of an attack with this weapon once to reduce the weapon's critical rating by 1, to a minimum of 1. Game Masters may spend one despair result to damage the weapon one step.
Modification Options: 1 Upgrade the difficulty of an attack one additional time to reduce the critical rating by 1 (to a minimum of 1) Mod, 2 Damage +1 Mods.

name: Under-barrel Flame Projector
subtitle: Uncommon but highly effective, under-barrel flame projectors are designed to give infantry an extra punch at close range.
description: This attachment can only be applied to rifle-sized weapons.
Models Include: Czerka "Firestorm" Under-Barrel Flame Projector, Merr-Sonn XR14 Sunsear Flame Projector, SoroSuub "Inferno" Auxiliary Flamer.
Base Modifiers: Enables weapon to fire using the following profile at the user's choice: (Ranged ; Damage 10; Critical 2; Range ; Blast 2, Burn 5). Adds Cumbersome (+1) to weapon.
Modification Options: None.

name: Under-barrel Grapnel Launcher
subtitle: Often seen among mercenary and special operations forces, under-barrel grapnel launchers provide a quick way to scale sheer surfaces in the midst of a combat situation or during a covert infiltration.
description: This attachment can be used with any Ranged (Light) or Ranged (Heavy) weapon that could logically have a grapnel launcher mounted on it.
Models Include: Merr-Sonn KR-2 Auxiliary Grapnel, TaggeCo "Skysailer" Grapnel Launcher.
Base Modifiers: As an action, a character may make an Average difficulty Ranged (Light) check to secure the grappling hook to an object within medium range. On success, as an action, they may reel in the cord, pulling themselves to the object (or, if the object is unsecured and lighter than they are, pulling it to them). A character may use the grappling hook to pull another character aloft with them; if they do, they must make an Average difficulty Athletics check to avoid losing their grip on their partner or the gun. Increases weapon's encumbrance by 2.
Modification Options: None.

name: Under-barrel Grenade Launcher (GaG)
subtitle: Under-barrel grenade launchers are designed to give single soldiers or squads heavy anti-infantry or light anti-vehicle capabilities in a small package.
description: This attachment can only be applied to rifle-sized Ranged (Heavy) weapons.
Models Include: Czerka "Thumper" Under-Barrel Grenade Launcher, SoroSuub XA203 Auxiliary Grenade Launcher, Zone Control "Viper" Under-Barrel Grenade Launcher.
Base Modifiers: Enables weapon to fire grenades. This uses the grenade's profile, but it uses the Ranged (Heavy) skill to fire and has a range of medium. Adds Cumbersome (+1) to weapon and increases encumbrance by 2. Grenades are Limited Ammo 1 weapons, and thus the launcher is Limited Ammo 1.
Modification Options: 5 Item Quality (Limited Ammo +1) Mods.

name: Under-barrel Grenade Launcher (AoR, EotE)
subtitle: Under-barrel grenade launchers are designed to give single soldiers or squads heavy anti-infantry or light anti-vehicle capabilities in a small package.
description: This attachment can only be applied to rifle-sized Ranged (Heavy) weapons.
Models Include: Czerka "Thumper" Under-Barrel Grenade Launcher, SoroSuub XA203 Auxiliary Grenade Launcher, Zone Control "Viper" Under-Barrel Grenade Launcher.
Base Modifiers: Enables weapon to fire grenades. This uses the grenade's profile, but it uses the Ranged (Heavy) skill to fire and has a range of medium. Adds Cumbersome (+1) to weapon and increases encumbrance by 2. Grenades are Limited Ammo 1 weapons, and thus the launcher is Limited Ammo 1.
Modification Options: 5 Item Quality (Limited Ammo +1) Mods.

name: Under-barrel Micro-Rocket Rack
subtitle: Since their inception, micro-rockets have proven to be versatile weapon systems. They are a favorite of many bounty hunters, who tend to find themselves in unexpected situations in which a variety of munitions comes in handy.
description: This attachment can be installed on any ranged weapon.
Models Include: BlasTech "Finisher" Rocket Rack, TaggeCo Under-Barrel Rocket Battery.
Base Modifiers: Enables weapon to fire one loaded micro-rocket. Adds the Cumbersome (+1) quality to weapon and increases encumbrance by 3. As micro-rockets are Limited Ammo 1 weapons, the launcher has the Limited Ammo 1 quality, and thus must be reloaded with a new micro-rocket to be fired again.
Modification Options: 2 Mount one additional micro-rocket Mods, 2 Remove a setback die from checks to fire micro-rockets from this attachment Mods.

name: Underslung Scattergun (GaG)
subtitle: An ungainly attachment, an underslung scattergun is a single-shot slugthrower that can be attached to another weapon.
description: This attachment can only applied to pistol-sized [Ranged (Light)] and rifle-sized [Ranged (Heavy)] weapon. While Fly Casual: A Sourcebook for Smugglers lacks a Critical Rating, the Errata (Page 4) corrects this to 5.
Models Include: Czerka "Leveller" Under-barrel Scattergun, Merr-Sonn XZ03 Scattershell Slugthrower Attachment, Goseia Heavy Industries Concern "Troubleshooter" Underslung Slugthrower.
Base Modifiers: Enables weapon to fire using the following profile at the user's choice: (Ranged ; Damage 6; Critical 5; Range ; Blast 5, Knockdown, Limited Ammo 1). Adds Cumbersome (+1) to weapon.
Modification Options: None.

name: Underslung Scattergun (FC)
subtitle: An ungainly attachment, an underslung scattergun is a single-shot slugthrower that can be attached to another weapon.
description: This attachment can only applied to pistol-sized [Ranged (Light)] and rifle-sized [Ranged (Heavy)] weapon. While Fly Casual: A Sourcebook for Smugglers lacks a Critical Rating, the Errata (Page 4) corrects this to 5.
Models Include: Czerka "Leveller" Under-barrel Scattergun, Merr-Sonn XZ03 Scattershell Slugthrower Attachment, Goseia Heavy Industries Concern "Troubleshooter" Underslung Slugthrower.
Base Modifiers: Enables weapon to fire using the following profile at the user's choice: (Ranged ; Damage 6; Critical 5; Range ; Blast 5, Knockdown, Limited Ammo 1). Adds Cumbersome (+1) to weapon.
Modification Options: None.

name: Vibro-bayonet
subtitle: Although most fights are resolved with exchanges of blaster fire, a close-range fire fight can quickly turn into a melee.
description: This attachment can only be applied to any Ranged (Heavy) weapon that could logically mount a bayonet.
Models Include: Czerka Arms "Last Resort" Vibro-Bayonet, Merr-Sonn Model 3 Combat Attachment.
Base Modifiers: Enables the weapon to be used in melee combat with the following profile at the user's choice: (Melee; Damage +1; Critical 2; Range ; Inaccurate 1, Pierce 2, Vicious 1).
Modification Options: 2 Increase the Melee weapon's damage by 1 Mods.

name: Weapon Harness
subtitle: Designed to allow a single sentient to field even the heaviest portable weapon with no support, weapon harnesses are common among heavy weapon squads.
description: This attachment can only be used with Ranged (Heavy) and Gunnery weapons.
Models Include: Arakyd WW480 "Goliath" Weapons Harness, Galactic Arms HR12 Power Harness, SoroSuub "Little Giant" Heavy Weapon Power Assist.
Base Modifiers: Decrease the weapon's Cumbersome rating by 2.
Modification Options: 1 Innate Talent (Brace) Mod.

name: Weapon Signature Reduction
subtitle: Both the Empire and the galactic security industry use weapon scanners that are capable of detecting a wide variety of weapon components.
description: Weapon signature reduction is only effective on weapons with an encumbrance rating of 3 or less.
Base Modifiers: Increase the difficulty of checks using scanners to search for this weapon by 2. Due to the masking used on various weapon components, this modification adds a setback die to all Mechanics checks when performing maintenance on this weapon.
Modification Options: None.

name: Weapon Sling
subtitle: Slings are lengths of hide or synthetic fabric designed to allow easy handling of long arms like blaster rifles.
description: This attachment can only be used with Ranged (Heavy) weapons.
Models Include: Custom-Tooled Bantha Hide Sling, Tactical Three-Point Sling, Quick-Release One-Point Drop Sling.
Base Modifiers: Decrease Cumbersome rating by 1.
Modification Options: 1 Innate Talent (Quick Draw) Mod.

name: Weighted Head
subtitle: Bludgeoning weapons, such as truncheons, clubs, and staffs, deal damage through weight and impact.
description: This attachment may only be used on bludgeoning Brawl and Melee weapons.
Base Modifiers: Damage +1.
Modification Options: 1 Damage +1 Mod, 1 Item Quality (Concussive +1) Mod.

name: Wrist Mount (GaG)
subtitle: Originally developed to allow species without opposable thumbs to use pistols, a wrist mount ensures that their user always has a weapon ready while keeping their hands free.
description: This attachment can be applied to any Ranged (Light) weapon.
Models Include: Corellian Arms Model 2 Wrist Mount, BlasTech WM-Alpha Pistol Brace.
Base Modifiers: The weapon can be worn on the user's wrist, allowing them to use their hands without interference.
Modification Options: None.

name: Wrist Mount (CotR, DC)
subtitle: Originally developed to allow species without opposable thumbs to use pistols, a wrist mount ensures that their user always has a weapon ready while keeping their hands free.
description: This attachment can be applied to any Ranged (Light) weapon.
Models Include: Corellian Arms Model 2 Wrist Mount, BlasTech WM-Alpha Pistol Brace.
Base Modifiers: The weapon can be worn on the user's wrist, allowing them to use their hands without interference.
Modification Options: None.

name: XCiter Overcharge
subtitle: An XCiter overcharge allows an individual to empty a blaster's energy cell in a single, extremely powerful shot.
description: While typically applied to holdout blasters, this attachment can be applied to any personal blaster weapon.
Base Modifiers: As an incidental, shooters may overcharge the XCiter on their blaster. This gives the weapon the Prepare 1 item quality and increases its damage on the next attack by 4. Once it is fired, the weapon runs out of ammo and must be recharged. GMs may spend three threat results or a despair result from any combat check involving an overcharged shot with this weapon to cause the weapon to explode and deal its base damage to the shooter.
Modification Options: None.

name: Barab Ingot
subtitle: Barab ingots are a rare kyber crystal variants from the heavily irradiated world of Barab I, home of the saurian Barabel people.
description: More information about the crystal available on the Wookieepedia article.
Base Modifiers: Installing this crystal changes a lightsaber's base damage to 8 and its critical rating to 3. In addition, the lightsaber gains the Breach 1, Burn 1, and Sunder item qualities. If the crystal is ever removed, the lightsaber loses these qualities and reverts to its previous base damage and critical rating.
Modification Options: 2 Item Quality (Burn +1) Mods, 2 Item Quality (Vicious +1) Mods.

name: Blade Drain
subtitle: The blade drain attachment works by creating a small power drain when the lightsaber is in contact with another lightsaber blade.
description: This attachment can only be applied to lightsabers.
Base Modifiers: When making a combat check targeting an opponent with a lightsaber, the character may spend a triumph result to reduce the opponent's lightsaber's base damage by 1 for the remainder of the encounter. If the combat check generates three threat results, the blade collapses as the power supply fails and may not be reignited until the character's next turn.
Modification Options: 2 Item Quality (Defensive +1) Mods.

name: Catastrophic Failure Modification
subtitle: t is possible for an expert in lightsaber construction to bypass the weapon's normal safeguards in order to overload it, such as by inverting the emitter matrix, releasing a massive amount of plasma energy.
Base Modifiers: Once modified this way, the lightsaber no longer functions normally. Instead, when the lightsaber is activated, it begins to overload. At the end of the following round, the lightsaber detonates, dealing 20 damage with the Breach 1 and Vicious 4 item qualities to all characters and objects within short range. The lightsaber, but not its kyber crystal, is destroyed in the process.
Modification Options: None.

name: Christophsis Crystal
subtitle: The crystal world of Christophsis was an early flash point in the Clone Wars, and it has seen continuing conflict throughout the war.
Base Modifiers: Installing this crystal changes a lightsaber's base damage to 7 and critical rating to 3, and the lightsaber gains the Breach 1 and Sunder item qualities. If the crystal is ever removed, the lightsaber loses these qualities and reverts to its previous base damage and critical rating.
Modification Options: 1 Item Quality (Breach +1) Mod, 1 Item Quality (Knockdown) Mod, 3 Damage +1 Mods, 2 Decrease the weapon's critical rating by 1 to a minimum of 1 Mods.

name: Corrupted Crystal
subtitle: [Dark side] Force users bend the kyber crystals in their lightsabers to their will, leading to the crimson hue of blades produced by these corrupted crystals.
description: Characters whose Morality reaches 70 meet the requirements to reclaim the crystal, but doing so should be treated as a major story moment. In addition, GMs may wish to require a Hard difficulty Discipline check with appropriate modifiers as a final challenge to fully purge the crystal in order to represent the crystal's final resistance to being claimed.
Base Modifiers: Installing this crystal changes a lightsaber's base damage to 6, its critical rating to 2, and the lightsaber gains the Breach 1, Sunder, and Vicious 2 item qualities. When a character wielding this lightsaber makes a Force power check, they add a dark point to the check. When the Force-sensitive character's Morality rises to 70 or more, this crystal is reclaimed; it no longer provides a dark point and it loses the Vicious item quality, though it continues to function as above in all other respects. If the crystal is ever removed, the lightsaber loses these qualities and reverts to its previous base damage and critical rating.
Modification Options: 2 Damage +1 Mods, 1 Decrease weapon's critical rating by 1 to a minimum of 1 Mod, 1 Item Quality (Vicious +1) Mod.

name: Cracked Crystal
subtitle: These crystals may be flawed, cracked, or otherwise damaged.
description: This item cannot be bought; it must be found.
Base Modifiers: Installing this crystal changes a lightsaber's base damage to 7, its critical rating to 3, and the lightsaber gains the Breach 2, Sunder, and Vicious 1 item qualities. If a combat check made with this lightsaber results in a despair result, the GM may cause the crystal to shatter, after which the lightsaber loses these qualities and reverts to its previous base damage and critical rating. If the crystal is ever removed, the lightsaber loses these qualities and reverts to its previous base damage and critical rating.
Modification Options: 1 Decrease the weapon's critical rating by 1 to a minimum of 1 Mod, 2 Item Quality (Vicious +1) Mods.

name: Cracked Jedha Crystal
subtitle: When a terrible mining accident destroyed Jedha City, the galaxy lost one of the last known sources of kyber crystals.
description: More information about the crystal available on the Wookieepedia article.
Base Modifiers: Installing this crystal changes a lightsaber's damage to 7 and critical rating to 3, and the lightsaber gains the Breach 1, Inaccurate 2, Sunder, and Vicious 1 qualities. If the crystal is ever removed, the lightsaber loses these qualities and reverts to its previous base damage and critical rating.
Modification Options: 3 Item Quality (Vicious +1) Mods, 2 Damage +1 Mods, 1 Item Quality (Inaccurate –1) Mod. 1 Decrease the weapon's critical rating by 1 to a minimum of 1 Mod.

name: Curved Hilt
subtitle: The curved hilt is preferred by duelists and practitioners of the second lightsaber form, Makashi.
description: This attachment can only be applied to lightsabers.
Base Modifiers: Adds an automatic advantage result to successful Lightsaber combat checks when the wielder is engaged with a single opponent.
Modification Options: 1 Item Quality (Defensive +1) Mod.

name: Cyclic Crystal Array
subtitle: Lightsabers rely on kyber crystals attuned to the wielder to create energy blades of different types.
description: This attachment can only be applied to lightsabers.
Base Modifiers: Allows installation of a second lightsaber crystal at no additional hard point cost. Whenever the wielder ignites the lightsaber, they choose one of the crystals to be the active crystal that produces the blade; any other crystals installed have no effect. As a maneuver, while the lightsaber is not ignited, the wielder may switch any one lightsaber crystal in the hilt to be the active crystal that produces the blade.
Modification Options: 1 Install a third lightsaber crystal at no additional hard point cost Mod.

name: Damping Emitter
subtitle: Before the Jedi's destruction, many Jedi elected to modify their hilts to reduce the amount of energy their blade projected.
description: This attachment can only be applied to lightsabers.
Models Include: None; users must custom-make each lightsaber attachment.
Base Modifiers: As a maneuver, the wielder of the lightsaber may adjust the device to deal Stun damage. While the lightsaber is set to deal Stun damage, it decreases the damage it deals by two, increases its critical rating by one, and loses the Breach quality. Adjusting the lightsaber to normal settings requires another maneuver.
Modification Options: 2 Item Quality (Stun Damage +1) Mods.

name: Dantari Crystal
subtitle: As their name suggests, Dantari crystals are found on the Outer Rim world of Dantooine.
description: More information about the crystal available on the Wookieepedia article.
Base Modifiers: Installing this crystal changes a lightsaber's base damage to 7 and critical rating to 2, and the lightsaber gains the Breach 1 and Sunder weapon qualities. When making a Force power check as part of a combat check, a character using a lightsaber with a Dantari crystal may spend a Force point to recover 2 strain. If the crystal is ever removed, the lightsaber loses these qualities and abilities, and it reverts to its previous base damage and critical rating.
Modification Options: 2 Damage +1 Mods, 1 Decrease the weapon's critical rating by 1 to a minimum of 1 Mod.

name: Dragite Gem
subtitle: Small, dull, and brittle, dragite gems are found in the caves and caverns of the D'olop mountain range on M'haeli, an agriworld in the Expansion Region.
description: More information about the crystal available on the Wookieepedia article.
Base Modifiers: Installing this crystal changes a lightsaber's damage to 7, critical rating to 3, and the lightsaber gains the Breach 1, Disorient 1, and Sunder item qualities. If the crystal is ever removed, the lightsaber loses these qualities and reverts to its previous base damage and critical rating.
Modification Options: 1 Damage +1 Mod, 2 Item Quality (Concussive +1) Mods, 2 Item Quality (Disorient +1) Mods.

name: Dual-Phase Modification
subtitle: Considered antiquated by the time of the Clone Wars, the dual-phase modification is an artifact of an older, more violent time.
description: This attachment can only be applied to lightsabers.
Base Modifiers: The wielder may change the blade's length once per encounter as an incidental. The next attack the wielder makes that turn using this weapon ignores the target's melee defense.
Modification Options: None.

name: Etaan Crystal
subtitle: These unusual kyber crystals form in the deep caverns of the Mid Rim world of Etai.
Base Modifiers: Installing this crystal changes a lightsaber's base damage to 6 and critical rating to 2, and the lightsaber gains the Breach 1 and Sunder weapon qualities. If the crystal is ever removed, the lightsaber loses these qualities and reverts to its previous base damage and critical rating. In addition, while the Etaan crystal is installed in the lightsaber, if the character wielding the lightsaber uses the Improved Reflect talent to inflict an automatic hit, increase the damage dealt by that hit by 2.
Modification Options: 1 Item Quality (Vicious +1) Mod, 2 Damage +1 Mods, 1 Decrease the weapon's critical rating by 1 to a minimum of 1 Mod, 1 Innate Talent (Parry) Mod, 1 Innate Talent (Reflect) Mod.

name: Extended Hilt
subtitle: The idea behind the extended hilt modification is to increase the lightsaber's striking and cutting power by using the leverage of the longer handle and a two-handed grip to help focus the wielder's strength into the force of the blow.
description: This attachment can only be applied to lightsabers.
Base Modifiers: Increases weapon damage by 1.
Modification Options: 1 Item Quality (Vicious +1) Mod.

name: Flickerphase Blade
subtitle: Considered dishonorable and unsporting by most Jedi, so-called flickerphase modifications were never widely adopted.
description: More information about the crystal available on the Wookieepedia article.
Base Modifiers: Decrease the lightsaber's damage by 2 and add the Inaccurate 2 quality (or increase the existing quality by 1). When attacking with this lightsaber, targets cannot use the Parry incidental to reduce the damage of the attack.
Modification Options: 1 Item Quality (Inaccurate –1) Mod, 1 Damage +1 Mod.

name: Fusion Shunt
subtitle: A lightsaber is more than just a weapon. It is a symbol, a badge of office—and a tool.
Base Modifiers: Activating or deactivating the fusion shunt requires a maneuver. If the lightsaber is used as a weapon while the shunt is active, all combat checks suffer three threat results, but the weapon's Breach quality increases by 1. While the fusion shunt is active, the lightsaber can slice through obstacles with ease, destroying or cutting through barriers and other inanimate targets at twice the normal rate. Exact details are up to GM's discretion, but in general, hardened security doors and reinforced walls should withstand two or three rounds of cutting, with other obstacles being dealt with in a corresponding time frame.
Modification Options: None.

name: Ghostfire Crystal
subtitle: These kyber crystals grow in nearly invisible formations on a handful of far-flung Outer Rim worlds.
description: More information about the crystal available on the Wookieepedia article.
Base Modifiers: Installing this crystal changes a lightsaber's base damage to 6, critical rating to 2, and the lightsaber gains the Breach 1 and Sunder item qualities. If the crystal is ever removed, the lightsaber loses these qualities and reverts to its previous base damage and critical rating. In addition, while the ghostfire crystal is installed in the lightsaber, the wielder may spend four advantage results or a triumph result to prevent the target from using the Parry talent to reduce damage from this attack.
Modification Options: 2 Damage +1 Mods, 2 Item Quality (Defensive +1) Mods.

name: Hilt-masking Kit
subtitle: Owners of may have many reasons to want a subtler presence, yet still keep their lightsaber by their side.
description: This attachment can only be applied to lightsabers. The cost, rarity, and encumbrance of a hilt-masking kit are the same as those of the item it is meant to look like.
Base Modifiers: When attached to a lightsaber, this attachment adds two failure results to any attempts by other characters to find the lightsaber or to identify it as a lightsaber.
Modification Options: 2 Increase the number of failure results added by 1 Mods.

name: Ilum Crystal (GaG, FaD)
subtitle: The kyber crystals found deep within the caves of the icy planet Ilum were prized by the Jedi as some of the best crystals for constructing a lightsaber.
description: More information about the crystal available on the Wookieepedia article. The Rubat crystals found on Phemis function identically, as far as game mechanics are concerned.
Base Modifiers: Installing this crystal changes a lightsaber's base damage to 6, critical rating to 2, and the lightsaber gains the Breach 1 and Sunder weapon qualities. If the crystal is ever removed, the lightsaber loses these qualities and reverts to its previous base damage and critical rating.
Modification Options: 4 Damage +1 Mods, 1 Decrease the weapon's critical rating by 1 to a minimum of 1 Mod, 2 Item Quality (Vicious +1) Mods.

name: Ilum Crystal (CotR, RotS)
subtitle: The kyber crystals found deep within the caves of the icy planet Ilum were prized by the Jedi as some of the best crystals for constructing a lightsaber.
description: More information about the crystal available on the Wookieepedia article. The Rubat crystals found on Phemis function identically, as far as game mechanics are concerned.
Base Modifiers: Installing this crystal changes a lightsaber's base damage to 6, critical rating to 2, and the lightsaber gains the Breach 1 and Sunder weapon qualities. If the crystal is ever removed, the lightsaber loses these qualities and reverts to its previous base damage and critical rating.
Modification Options: 4 Damage +1 Mods, 1 Decrease the weapon's critical rating by 1 to a minimum of 1 Mod, 2 Item Quality (Vicious +1) Mods.

name: Ionizing Emitter Matrix
subtitle: Few droids can stand up to a lightsaber, but some heavily reinforced droid models have been known to fight through the destruction of their limbs and even some of their core systems to achieve their objectives.
Base Modifiers: Increase weapon's base damage by 2 when targeting droids and vehicles, but decrease base damage by 1 against organic and other targets.
Modification Options: None.

name: Kimber Stone
subtitle: Kimber stones are a type of kyber crystal produced by violent volcanic activity on the moon of Y'ness in the N'zoth system.
description: More information about the crystal available on the Wookieepedia article.
Base Modifiers: Installing a kimber stone changes a lightsaber's base damage to 9 and its critical rating to –. The lightsaber gains the Stun Damage quality. If the crystal is ever removed, the lightsaber loses these qualities and reverts to its previous base damage and critical rating.
Modification Options: 2 Damage +1 Mods, 1 Item Quality (Concussive +1) Mod, 2 Item Quality (Disorient +1 ) Mods.

name: Krayt Dragon Pearl
subtitle: Highly sought after by jewelers, artisans, and wealthy collectors, krayt dragon pearls are perhaps the rarest of the crystals used in the construction of lightsabers.
description: More information about the crystal available on the Wookieepedia article.
Base Modifiers: Installing this crystal changes the lightsaber's damage to 9, its critical rating to 1, and the lightsaber replaces its item qualities with the Breach 1, Sunder, and Vicious 1 item qualities. If the crystal is ever removed, the lightsaber loses these qualities and reverts to its previous base damage and critical rating.
Modification Options: 1 Damage +1 Mod, 3 Item Quality (Vicious +1) Mods.

name: Lorrdian Gemstone
subtitle: Lorrdian gemstones are kyber crystals mined millennia ago by enslaved Lorrdians during the Kanz Disorders.
description: More information about the crystal available on the Wookieepedia article.
Base Modifiers: Installing this crystal changes a lightsaber's damage to 7, its critical rating to 2, and the lightsaber gains the Breach 1, Defensive 1, and Sunder item qualities. If the crystal is ever removed, the lightsaber loses these qualities and reverts to its previous base damage and critical rating.
Modification Options: 1 Item Quality (Defensive +1) Mods, 2 Item Quality (Deflection +1) Mods.

name: Mephite Crystal
subtitle: Mephite crystals are rare, lustrous kyber crystals found in a handful of places in and around the Adega system.
description: More information about the crystal available on the Wookieepedia article.
Base Modifiers: Installing this crystal changes the lightsaber's damage to 8, its critical rating to 2, and the lightsaber gains the Breach 1 and Sunder item qualities. Force-sensitive characters using Force powers to sense their surroundings automatically detect a lightsaber using a mephite crystal if it is in range of the power. If the crystal is ever removed, the lightsaber loses these qualities and reverts to its previous base damage and critical rating.
Modification Options: 3 Damage +1 Mods, 1 Decrease the weapon's critical rating by 1 to a minimum of 1 Mod, 1 Item Quality (Vicious +1) Mod.

name: Nishalorite Stone
subtitle: Nishalorite stones are found on worlds with particularly strong magnetic fields.
description: More information about the crystal available on the Wookieepedia article.
Base Modifiers: Installing a nishalorite stone changes a lightsaber's damage to 7 and its critical rating to 3. In addition, the lightsaber gains the Breach 1 and Sunder item qualities. Additionally, a Force-sensitive character with this lightsaber in their possession adds an automatic advantage result to any of their checks made to determine their position, navigate terrain, or find power sources or active technology. If the crystal is ever removed, the lightsaber loses these qualities and reverts to its previous base damage and critical rating.
Modification Options: 1 Innate Talent (Planet Mapper) Mod, 2 Item Quality (Disorient +1) Mod, 1 Item Quality (Vicious +1) Mod.

name: Overcharged Power Cell
subtitle: Those who know what they are doing can sometimes overcharge the power cell of a lightsaber to increase the power of the blade, but these changes make the power cell volatile and potentially unstable.
description: This attachment can only be applied to lightsabers.
Models Include: None; users must custom-make each lightsaber attachment.
Base Modifiers: The wielder of this lightsaber can spend an advantage on a combat check to increase the damage by one, and the GM can spend two threat results to decrease the damage dealt by one.
Modification Options: None.

name: Pistol Hilt
subtitle: While the Jedi of old disdained blasters, modern Force users tend to need every advantage they can get.
description: This attachment can only be applied to lightsabers. The user must spend a maneuver to switch from one weapon mode to the other (from lightsaber function to pistol function, for example).
Models Include: None; users must custom-make each lightsaber attachment.
Base Modifiers: When the lightsaber is not ignited, the wielder may fire the pistol using the following profile: (Ranged ; Damage 6; Critical 3; Range ; Stun Damage).
Modification Options: None.

name: Pommel Cap
subtitle: The pommel cap is a small, weighted knob or similar piece attached to the base of a lightsaber's hilt.
description: This attachment can only be applied to lightsabers or any Melee weapon with a hilt.
Base Modifiers: When attached to a lightsaber hilt, this weapon gains the Stun 2 item quality. In addition, a single small item with an encumbrance value of zero may be stored in the pommel cap, with Game Master approval.
Modification Options: 2 Item Quality (Stun +1) Mods.

name: Reflex Grip
subtitle: Through a delicate system of motion sensors and miniaturized motors built into a lightsaber hilt, a craftsperson can alter the lightsaber to respond to adjustments in grip and position with greater responsiveness.
description: This attachment can only be applied to lightsabers.
Models Include: None; users must custom-make each lightsaber attachment.
Base Modifiers: When a character uses a Parry or Reflect incidental with a lightsaber that has a reflex grip installed, the character suffers 1 additional strain, but counts their ranks in Parry and Reflect as 1 higher.
Modification Options: 1 Item Quality (Defensive +1) Mod, 1 Item Quality (Deflection +1) Mod.

name: Sapith Gem
subtitle: Said to originate from a strange and mysterious world called Lwhekk in the Unknown Regions, sapith gems are similar to krayt dragon pearls in that they were formed when rocks containing a kyber crystal were consumed by a great beast.
description: More information about the crystal available on the Wookieepedia article.
Base Modifiers: Installing this crystal changes a lightsaber's damage to 7 and its critical rating to 2, and the lightsaber gains the Breach 1 and Sunder item qualities. If the crystal is ever removed, the lightsaber loses these qualities and reverts to its previous base damage and critical rating.
Modification Options: 1 Item Quality (Breach +1) Mod, 2 Damage +1 Mods, 1 Decrease the weapon's critical rating by 1 to a minimum of 1 Mod.
